allow: Bash(python -c "import mediapipe; import os; mp_modules_path = os.path.join\(os.path.dirname\(mediapipe.__file__\), ''modules''\); print\(mp_modules_path\); print\([d for d in os.listdir\(mp_modules_path\) if os.path.isdir\(os.path.join\(mp_modules_path, d\)\)][:10]\)")

Bash(python -c "import mediapipe; import os; mp_modules_path = os.path.join\(os.path.dirname\(mediapipe.__file__\), ''modules''\); for module in [''face_landmark'']: module_path = os.path.join\(mp_modules_path, module\); print\(f''{module}:'', os.listdir\(module_path\)[:10]\)")
